title: [MTR4] British Rail Class 395 Javelin
description: ResourcePack that adds the British Rail Class 395 Javelin from Hitachi Rail to Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![Class 395 with PBR textures](https://i.imgur.com/WuV5pQH.png)
The **British Rail Class 395 _“Javelin”_** is a high-speed electric multiple unit built by **Hitachi** between **2007 and 2009** for high-speed passenger services in the United Kingdom.
Designed to operate on **High Speed 1 (HS1)** as well as conventional rail lines, the Class 395 can reach a **maximum speed of 140 mph (225 km/h)** on high-speed infrastructure.

These trains are primarily operated by **Southeastern** and became widely known during the **London 2012 Olympic Games**, where they provided fast shuttle services between London and Stratford.

This resource pack adds the **British Rail Class 395** to Minecraft using the **Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)** mod.

The original 3D model was created for **Transport Fever 2** and published on the **Steam Workshop**.
This version has been **ported and adapted for Minecraft Transit Railway by Vitor2005**, with permission granted by **CW_315**, via a Third Person, ensuring compatibility with the MTR system and proper in-game functionality.

## Credits
**Original Transport Fever 2 Mod Team**
- **CW_315** – Textures, Script and Interior Model
- **Tyreman** – Model, Textures and Script
- **Elliott.85** – Model
- **Celmi** – Textures and Research
- **Quartzite** – Finishing the project and publishing the mod on the Steam Workshop

**Minecraft Transit Railway Port**
- **Vitor2005** – Porting and adaptation for MTR (with permission from CW_315)

## Disclaimer
This resource pack is **not affiliated with or endorsed by** Hitachi, Southeastern, Transport Fever 2, the original model creators, or the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
All trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners.
